py_theme_1: New beginnings — a 9-year cycle begins. Plant the seeds of your dreams.
py_theme_2: Partnerships and patience. Let relationships deepen and blossom.
py_theme_3: Creativity, joy, and expression — let your inner light shine brightly.
py_theme_4: Hard work and foundation-building. Discipline is your greatest asset.
py_theme_5: Change, freedom, and travel. Embrace the unexpected with open arms.
py_theme_6: Family, love, and responsibility. Nurture yourself and those around you.
py_theme_7: Reflection, spirituality, and inner work. Seek deeper truth within.
py_theme_8: Power, ambition, and finance. Your efforts will finally be rewarded.
py_theme_9: Completion and release. Close old chapters; a new cycle approaches.
py_theme_11: Spiritual awakening. Divine guidance is speaking — are you listening?
py_theme_22: Master year of manifestation. Think big. Build something legendary.
py_theme_33: Year of deep love and teaching. Serve humanity with your full heart.
tara_janma_desc: Karmic identity — the foundation of the birth chart
karaka_AK_desc: Soul, life's purpose, the inner self
room_main-door_idealDir: North, East or North-East (Ishan) — best direction
room_main-door_importance: The main door is the entry point of positive energy and prosperity. Its direction is the single most important Vastu factor for the entire home.
room_main-door_dos_0: North-East (Ishan) or North is the best direction for the main door
room_main-door_dos_1: Use a solid, heavy wooden door
room_main-door_dos_2: Place a Swastik or Om symbol above the entrance
room_main-door_dos_4: Keep the nameplate clean and clearly visible
room_main-door_donts_0: No column or pillar should stand directly facing the main door
room_main-door_donts_1: Do not place the main door in the South or South-West
room_main-door_donts_2: Do not pile shoes and slippers outside the main door
room_main-door_donts_3: Do not leave the door creaking or broken — repair immediately
room_main-door_donts_4: The bathroom should not face the main entrance directly
room_main-door_remedies_0: Place a 'Shri' or Ganpati symbol on the door for blessings
room_main-door_remedies_1: Place a rangoli or fresh flowers at the entrance every morning
room_main-door_remedies_2: Chant 'Om Namah Shivaya' while entering the home
room_living_idealDir: North or East wing of the home
room_living_importance: The living room is the centre of social energy in the home. Guests are welcomed here and the family gathers here.
room_living_dos_0: Place sofas and furniture in the NW or SW corner
room_living_dos_1: TV or entertainment unit should face the East or North wall
room_living_dos_2: Allow beneficial morning sunlight through East-facing windows
room_living_dos_3: Use light colours — white, cream, or light yellow
room_living_dos_4: Hang the clock on the North or East wall
room_living_donts_0: Do not place the sofa directly in front of the main door
room_living_donts_1: Avoid dark colours like black or dark red
room_living_donts_2: Remove broken or damaged furniture immediately
room_living_donts_3: Do not place a mirror in the corner near the door
room_living_remedies_0: Place a crystal ball in the North-East corner to boost positivity
room_living_remedies_1: Place a Laughing Buddha on the North wall for wealth
room_living_remedies_2: Place fresh flowers or plants in the NE or East corner
room_kitchen_importance: The kitchen is the seat of the fire element (Agni). Its position deeply affects the family's health, wealth and harmony.
room_kitchen_dos_0: South-East (SE) corner is the best place for the kitchen
room_kitchen_dos_1: Place the cooking platform such that the cook faces East
room_kitchen_dos_2: Keep the water source (sink) in the North-East corner of the kitchen
room_kitchen_dos_3: Use bright, warm colours — yellow, orange, or light red
room_kitchen_dos_4: Keep the kitchen clean and well-ventilated
room_kitchen_donts_0: Do not place the kitchen in the North-East — it disturbs the water-fire balance
room_kitchen_donts_1: The cook should not face South while cooking
room_kitchen_donts_2: Do not place the gas stove and sink right next to each other
room_kitchen_donts_3: The bathroom should not be directly adjacent to the kitchen
room_kitchen_remedies_0: Place a small Agni Dev idol in the South-East corner
room_kitchen_remedies_1: Light a ghee lamp daily before cooking
room_kitchen_remedies_2: Hang a copper Swastik on the kitchen wall
room_master-bedroom_idealDir: South-West (SW) — for the head of the family
room_master-bedroom_importance: The master bedroom is the place of rest and intimacy. Its direction directly affects health, sleep and the marital bond.
room_master-bedroom_dos_0: Master bedroom in the South-West (SW) is best
room_master-bedroom_dos_1: While sleeping the head should face South or East
room_master-bedroom_dos_2: Use solid wooden beds — avoid metal frames
room_master-bedroom_dos_3: Use soothing colours — light blue, green, or pink
room_master-bedroom_dos_4: Heavy furniture should be placed in the SW corner
room_master-bedroom_donts_0: Do not place a mirror facing the bed — it disturbs sleep
room_master-bedroom_donts_1: While sleeping, do not point the head North
room_master-bedroom_donts_2: Do not keep electronic devices close to the bed
room_master-bedroom_donts_3: Do not store water in the bedroom
room_master-bedroom_remedies_0: Place a pair of Mandarin ducks in the SW corner for love
room_master-bedroom_remedies_1: Place a rose quartz crystal on the bedside table
room_master-bedroom_remedies_2: Use white or light pink bedsheets
room_children_importance: The children's room shapes their growth, education and creativity. Its direction influences their concentration and confidence.
room_children_dos_0: West or NW is best for the children's room
room_children_dos_1: Study table should face East or North
room_children_dos_2: Use light, vibrant colours — green, blue, or yellow
room_children_dos_3: Place a small Saraswati idol on the study table
room_children_dos_4: Bookshelf should be on the East or North wall
room_children_donts_0: Do not place the bed under a beam
room_children_donts_1: Avoid sharp corners and pointed objects
room_children_donts_2: Do not keep a TV or computer right opposite the bed
room_children_remedies_0: Place a green plant in the East corner of the room
room_children_remedies_1: Hang an educational chart or motivational poster on the North wall
room_children_remedies_2: Use a small wind chime to invite positive energy
room_pooja_importance: The pooja room is the spiritual centre of the home. Its direction creates the link between divinity and the family's well-being.
room_pooja_dos_0: North-East (Ishan) is the best place for the pooja room
room_pooja_dos_1: While praying face East or North
room_pooja_dos_2: Use white, cream, or light yellow colours
room_pooja_dos_3: Idols should be at least 1 inch away from the wall
room_pooja_donts_0: Do not place a pooja room in the bedroom
room_pooja_donts_1: Bathroom or toilet should not be adjacent
room_pooja_donts_2: Do not keep broken idols or torn pictures
room_pooja_donts_3: Do not place idols facing each other
room_pooja_remedies_0: Hang a 'Om' symbol on the East wall
room_pooja_remedies_1: Place fresh flowers and incense daily
room_pooja_remedies_2: Chant the Gayatri Mantra in the morning
room_bathroom_importance: The bathroom is the place of waste removal. Its direction protects against negative energy and disease.
room_bathroom_dos_0: Bathroom in the North-West or West is best
room_bathroom_dos_1: The toilet seat should face North-South
room_bathroom_dos_2: Keep the bathroom door always closed
room_bathroom_dos_3: Use light blue or white tiles
room_bathroom_donts_0: Do not place the bathroom in the North-East — it spoils prosperity
room_bathroom_donts_1: Bathroom should not be in the centre of the home (Brahmasthan)
room_bathroom_donts_2: Bathroom door should not face the kitchen or pooja room
room_bathroom_donts_3: Do not let water leak — repair immediately
room_bathroom_remedies_0: Place a sea-salt bowl in the bathroom corner
room_bathroom_remedies_1: Use camphor or essential oils for cleansing
room_bathroom_remedies_2: Hang a Vastu Pyramid on the bathroom door
room_study_importance: The study room shapes career, education and concentration. Its direction enhances the mind's focus and intelligence.
room_study_dos_0: East or North is best for the study room
room_study_dos_1: While studying face East or North
room_study_dos_2: Use light, refreshing colours — green or light blue
room_study_dos_3: Bookshelf should be on the East or North wall
room_study_dos_4: Place a small lamp on the study table
room_study_donts_0: Do not place the study table directly under a beam
room_study_donts_1: Sharp corners should not be in front of the study
room_study_donts_2: Do not place a mirror facing the study table
room_study_remedies_0: Place a Saraswati idol on the study table
room_study_remedies_1: Place a small plant in the North-East corner
room_study_remedies_2: Place a crystal globe on the table for clarity
